column1: # description: Barth-Beltran: basis trade total vs TIC-visible

column4: Barth et al. Oct 2025: '$1T increase Jan 2022-Dec 2024' => ~$850B start
column9: Primary citation: Barth, Beltran, Hoops, Kahn, Liu, Perozek, Fed FEDS Notes Oct 15 2025. total_bn = total basis trade exposure (Cayman-registered funds). tic_bn = TIC-visible portion ($423B). gap_bn = invisible portion ($1.4T, FICC novation breaks TIC chain).

column4: Barth, Beltran, Hoops, Kahn, Liu, Perozek. 'Cross-Border Trail of the Treasury Basis Trade.' Fed FEDS Notes Oct 15 2025. Cayman exposure $1.85T; TIC-visible $423B; gap $1.4T
column9: Primary citation: Barth, Beltran, Hoops, Kahn, Liu, Perozek, Fed FEDS Notes Oct 15 2025. total_bn = total basis trade exposure (Cayman-registered funds). tic_bn = TIC-visible portion ($423B). gap_bn = invisible portion ($1.4T, FICC novation breaks TIC chain).
